headline: Bills Sign UFL MVP Wheeler, Brady Opens Up
writeup: The Buffalo Bills made a splashy addition by signing United Bowl MVP running back Ian Wheeler, injecting competition into the backfield as training camp approaches. Head coach Joe Brady made headlines off the field, revealing he was 'broken' and 'devastated' when the Bills fired Sean McDermott, offering a rare emotional glimpse into the franchise's turbulent coaching transition. On the roster front, Buffalo is navigating several position battles, including an unexpected QB2 competition and questions in the secondary, with cornerback Dee Alford emerging as a name to watch. Meanwhile, off-field storylines continue to swirl, including Josh Allen and wife Hailee Steinfeld revealing their baby's name, and Stefon Diggs dropping hints about his next destination as a Bills reunion appears increasingly unlikely. With Highmark Stadium being dismantled piece by piece and a new era underway, the 2026 Bills are clearly in a period of significant transition both on and off the field.
